title: hieracium ctenodon subsp. ormontinum
intro: Hieracium ctenodon subsp. ormontinum, also known as Ormont's Hawkweed, is a subspecies of the Hieracium ctenodon plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Hieracium ctenodon subsp. ormontinum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, teas, or salves, which can be used topically to apply its medicinal properties to the skin.
